_comment: Labeled test scenarios. Each scenario has one `expected` extraction and 4 `phrasings` in different tones (direct, verbose, vague, emotional/casual). The scorer runs each phrasing independently; a model passes a scenario only if it extracts correctly across all tones. `acceptable` lists tolerated alternates per field. null = extractor should leave unset.

phrasings.text: Mute all notifications from Slack
I would like to suppress every single notification that the Slack application produces, across all channels and workspaces, without exception, please.
slack is too loud, fix it
UGH — Slack is driving me up the wall. Turn the whole thing off.
Silence WhatsApp

um, I think I'd like WhatsApp to be quiet? if that's okay
